hypothesis: If a closed-loop Bayesian optimization algorithm adjusts bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration, bicarbonate flow rate, KOH concentration, KOH flow rate, and applied current density for silver-nanoparticle-coated gas-diffusion-electrode reactive carbon electrolyzers, then it will rapidly converge to parameter combinations that produce significantly higher reactor yield than random or space-filling searches, with bicarbonate concentration and applied current density being the most influential determinants of yield.
